Spatial Distribution Snapshots 20×20 Diffusion Grid
SPATIAL MODEL: 2-D diffusion grid (20×20 cells) with periodic boundary conditions. Each genotype spreads via discrete Laplacian diffusion (D=0.08). Cell densities are rescaled each step to match the global ODE population totals. Shown at 10 evenly-spaced time snapshots.
